source: Window-scoped recording of the ChatGPT/Codex desktop window while the supported in-app browser opened the local WorkshopLM route.

privacy.method: Recorded the Codex window by window ID, then cropped to the in-app browser pane. Other applications and the unrelated Codex task pane are absent from the final clip.

limitations: This proves the local Workshop opened in the Codex in-app browser; it does not prove ChatGPT Work parity.
The visible voice action is the implemented capture surface; this clip does not prove a provider-backed Realtime turn.
